title: Xtrata Recursive Canary
subtitle: Agentic preflight artefact for the first automated recursive release flow in this repo.
message: If this bundle lands cleanly, the BVST first-wave release can follow with materially lower operational risk and a proven dependency-aware mint path.
provenance: Prepared as a small Xtrata collection before the BVST first-wave bundle.
Designed to be minted by an agent-managed loop with on-chain verification after every step.
Kept intentionally legible so future viewers can reconstruct how the release graph closes.
proof_points: Leaf artifacts must mint before rendered catalogs can be finalized.
Rendered catalogs must absorb real token IDs before they become mintable.
The root catalog should only close after the runtime and release catalogs resolve.
trace_guide: Start with the shell artifact to understand the public-facing intent.
Inspect the runtime catalog to see the leaf modules that support the shell.
Inspect the release catalog to see how the shell, schema, and runtime catalog are bound.
Inspect the root catalog to see the final closure point for the recursive graph.
operator_checklist: Confirm the rendered catalogs stayed stable.
Confirm the root catalog resolves after the release catalog is minted.
Open the final shell HTML and confirm it renders the success state.
footer_note: This shell is intentionally standalone. The deeper provenance lives in the recursive catalogs that close around it.
